findings.disposition: All specifications of the complaint denied

findings.parties: Antioch Session vs. Eastern Carolina Presbytery
findings.disposition: Judgment 1 APPROVED by SJC: 13 concurring, 4 dissenting; Judgment 2 APPROVED by SJC: 17 concurring; Licensure examination sustained, restriction on teaching certain views upheld

findings.parties: RE Sang Bai Kim and RE Chan Soo Kim vs. Korean Eastern Presbytery
findings.disposition: Complaint sustained; lower court decision reversed in whole on both issues
findings.note: Complete Standing Judicial Commission decision with full body (Summary of Facts, Statement of Issues, Judgment, Reasoning and Opinion, and roll call vote showing 15 concur, 3 dissent, 1 disqualified, 4 absent). The row metadata indicating case 2002-28 and 'Gardiner v. North Georgia' does not match the actual content at printed page 95.

findings.parties: RE Leland Nichols and RE Sam Couch vs. James River Presbytery
findings.disposition: James River Presbytery erred in refusing to grant the constitutional request of West End Presbyterian Church to dissolve the pastoral relationship with its pastor in a timely manner. Presbytery had no constitutional basis for delay beyond April 21, 2001.
findings.note: Comprehensive decision spanning three consolidated cases (2001-34, 2002-2, 2002-3) with 17 total complaints. Vote: 13 concurring, 3 dissenting (M.C. Culbertson, Steven T. O'Ban, W. Jack Williamson dissent). Includes Statement of Facts, Judgment, extensive Reasoning and Opinion with multiple legal points, vote record, and concurring opinions by Samuel J. Duncan and Thomas F. Leopard.
